utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 items appear in the final coverage plan. Check details: Each requires the specific category with costs. Health: includes policy name, monthly and annual costs, and description of coverage; costs present. Property: includes policy, monthly and annual costs, coverage details; includes a setup fee detail; costs present. Travel: includes policy, monthly and annual costs, coverage description; costs present. Additional services: includes service name, monthly and annual costs, and coverage type; costs are marked as estimates but still specified with amounts, which qualifies as provided costs. Total_budget: includes monthly and annual totals, setup fees, savings, effective date; breakdown present. Therefore, all items are included and sufficiently specified with costs.
